features: 【FASHIONABLE APPEARANCE】Our shower cap is available in 2 colors and patterns, with a simple and elegant design, which is both fun and fashionable. It can go with your everyday wear and make you look cute. If you're having trouble choosing, these polka-dot shower caps will definitely meet your needs.

【PREMIUM WATERPROOF】Women's Shower Caps are fully lined with double layers to protect hair from water. With elastic rubber band on the edge, it is lightweight and portable, can be folded into a small size, easy to carry when traveling, comfortable to wear, easy to air dry, providing you with a more comfortable feeling.

【REUSABLE】The women's shower cap fabric is soft, elastic and firm, and the elastic band won't leave scary marks on your forehead. The good elasticity of the elastic band makes the shower cap durable and can be used to hold the hair in the shower or when cleaning.

【COMFORTABLE AND EASY TO WEAR】The long hair shower cap has a generous size to accommodate your fluffy hair. Elastic band design, suitable for both adults and children. The shower cap is tight enough to not move and move during the shower, but still comfortable and ensures your hair doesn't get wet, especially your hairline.

【KEEP YOUR HAIR DRY】Reusable shower cap is suitable for all hair. Light and comfortable women's shower cap is not only suitable for bathing and showering, but also for makeup, spa, cooking and cleaning, it can effectively prevent hair from getting wet and dirty. They are the perfect tool for fixing hair.
description: Product Description Waterproof shower cap ·Adopting high-tech waterproof fabric, it can block water, oil and dust from damaging hair. Size & Elastic design ·Diameter is about 28cm,the edge has soft elastic band, which can easily fit various head shapes Reusable ·Wear-resistant and reusable. How to Use Tie Your Hair Up Tidy Up The Messy Hair At The Back Of The Neck Put On The Shower Cap
